_comment: Care Pal canonical structured-output schema. Used as the structured output (text format) from Lab 1 onward. Referenced by content/labs/lab-01.md. Keep enums in sync with content/prompts/test-prompts.json.
name: care_pal_triage

reply.description: Patient-facing message. Plain, warm, <120 words. Never diagnoses.

source_labels.description: Human-readable names of grounded sources actually used. Empty if none.

source_urls.description: URLs for the sources. MUST be empty when no grounded source supports the reply — never fabricate.

clarifying_questions.description: Questions to ask when info is insufficient. Empty unless route = clarification.
